stories.title: Otteroo Infant Neck Floats — CPSC Renews "Do Not Use" Warning

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: 🚨 COS parents: As of June 15, CPSC renewed its Do Not Use warning for Otteroo LUMI and MINI infant neck floats. A new federal safety standard is now in effect. Stop use immediately. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Otteroo has refused to recall its infant neck floats despite a CPSC Do Not Use warning renewed June 15. Drowning risk if the float deflates. If your baby uses one, stop now. cpsc.gov or 1-800-638-2772. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: CPSC Renews "Do Not Use" Warning for Otteroo Infant Neck Floats as New Federal Safety Standard Takes Effect

| Standard applies to neck floats manufactured after June 15, 2026 | HIGH | prnewswire.com |
| Otteroo has refused CPSC's request for a recall; continues manufacturing | HIGH | cbsnews.com, consumerreports.org, cpsc.gov |

| Action: stop use immediately | HIGH | prnewswire.com (CPSC press release) |

stories.title: 4th Annual Juneteenth Celebration — African American Museum, June 19

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: COS families — the 4th Annual Juneteenth Celebration is this Thursday, June 19 at the African American Museum, Westside Community Center. Freedom March at noon. Museum tours 1 PM and 2:30 PM. Free. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: COS has two free Juneteenth events this week. Thursday June 19: Freedom March at Westside Community Center. Weekend June 20-21: Southern CO Juneteenth Festival at Norris Penrose. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

stories.title: Colorado Renaissance Festival — Pirates Invasion Weekend June 20-21

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Pirates Invasion Weekend at the Colorado Renaissance Festival is this Saturday and Sunday, June 20-21 in Larkspur (~30 min from COS). King Soopers advance tickets: $29 adult, $14 ages 5-12, free under 5. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

stories.title: D49 Free Summer Meals — 3 Days Left, Ends June 19

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: ⏰ 3 days left — D49 free summer meals end Thursday, June 19. Springs Ranch Elementary (4350 Centerville Dr). Breakfast 7:45-8:15 AM, lunch 10:30-11:20 AM. Ages 1-18, any district, no registration. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: D49 free summer meals end Thursday. After June 19, D11 continues through July 31 at multiple COS locations. Springs Ranch Elementary is your last D49 chance this week. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

stories.title: D49 Student Success Center — What Families Need to Know Now

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: D49's new Student Success Center opens in August at the former Falcon Elementary of Technology. Programs: preschool Mon-Thu, Base49 before/after care, PEAK, and Elevates 18-21. Budget is passed. Start at d49.org. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]
